about_title: SOrloz, your trusted consumer credit partner
about_text: With over 70 years of expertise in the world of credit, SOrloz is committed to being there for you at every moment.
faq_q1: What types of loans does SOrloz offer?
faq_a1: SOrloz offers 3 main types of consumer credit: Personal Loans, revolving credit, and credit consolidation.
faq_q2: How long between loan offer acceptance and fund release?
faq_a2: After signing the loan offer, you have a 14-calendar-day withdrawal period. Funds are released after this period.
faq_q3: How do I apply for consumer credit?
faq_a3: 1. Simulate your project. 2. Fill in the online form. 3. Get an immediate response. 4. Sign electronically. 5. Receive your funds.
faq_q4: What documents do I need to provide?
faq_a4: An identity document, proof of address, the last tax notice and a bank account details (RIB).
faq_q5: Up to what age can I borrow?
faq_a5: There is no legal age limit. Lenders focus on your repayment capacity.
